title: GitLab Project
description: A GitLab project containing a Git repository, issues, merge requests, CI/CD pipelines, and other DevOps resources.

id.description: The unique identifier of the project.

name.description: The display name of the project.

description.description: A short description of the project.

path.description: The URL-friendly path component of the project name.

path_with_namespace.description: The full path of the project including the namespace, such as group/project-name.

name_with_namespace.description: The full name of the project including the namespace.

visibility.description: The visibility level of the project.

web_url.description: The URL to access the project in a browser.

http_url_to_repo.description: The HTTP URL for cloning the repository.

ssh_url_to_repo.description: The SSH URL for cloning the repository.

readme_url.description: The URL to the README file of the default branch.

default_branch.description: The default branch of the repository.

topics.description: List of topic tags associated with the project.

archived.description: Whether the project is archived and read-only.

empty_repo.description: Whether the repository has been initialized with commits.

creator_id.description: The ID of the user who created the project.

star_count.description: The number of stars the project has received.

forks_count.description: The number of forks of the project.

open_issues_count.description: The number of open issues in the project.

ci_config_path.description: The path to the CI/CD configuration file relative to the repository root.

issues_access_level.description: The access level for the issues feature.

merge_requests_access_level.description: The access level for the merge requests feature.

builds_access_level.description: The access level for CI/CD pipelines and builds.

wiki_access_level.description: The access level for the project wiki.

container_registry_access_level.description: The access level for the container registry.

pages_access_level.description: The access level for GitLab Pages.

created_at.description: The date and time the project was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the project was last updated.

last_activity_at.description: The date and time of the last activity in the project.

Namespace.description: The namespace (user or group) that owns the project.

id.description: The unique identifier of the namespace.

name.description: The display name of the namespace.

path.description: The URL path of the namespace.

kind.description: Whether the namespace belongs to a user or a group.

full_path.description: The full path of the namespace.

parent_id.description: The ID of the parent namespace for subgroups.

avatar_url.description: URL to the namespace avatar image.

web_url.description: URL to the namespace page on GitLab.

UserSummary.description: A simplified representation of a GitLab user.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

state.description: The current state of the user account.

avatar_url.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

web_url.description: URL to the user's profile on GitLab.

Permissions.description: The access permissions the current user has on the project.

project_access.description: Direct project access level for the user.

group_access.description: Group-inherited access level for the user.

access_level.description: Access level value inherited from group membership.

Statistics.description: Storage and activity statistics for the project.

commit_count.description: The total number of commits in the default branch.

job_artifacts_size.description: CI/CD job artifacts size in bytes.
